what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon showing a document with a folded corner and a downward download arrow.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with viewBox, width, and height all set for a 24x24 icon.
Draws with no fill and currentColor stroke for themeable color inheritance.
Uses 1.5 stroke width with round line caps and joins.
Contains two path elements: one for the document outline and folded corner, one for the downward arrow.
standouts: Document and download-arrow metaphors are combined in a compact SVG.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: 24x24 canvas, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded stroke ends.
Uses path-only geometry instead of named SVG shapes.
notes: This is a small reusable file-download icon asset rendered as a stroked document with a downward arrow.
questions: Is the document outline intentionally combined into one path rather than separate editable elements?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a file download icon, and the SVG depicts a document with a downward download arrow.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable, color-inheriting icon for a file download action.
contribution: Provides a compact SVG asset for representing file download actions with document context and themeable stroke styling.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a document with a folded corner and downward download arrow.
intention_for_embedding: This was for reusable UI representation of a file download action in an icon set.
